scan.title: Rate your look
scan.subtitle: Couture-grade analysis, strict but fair.
scan.hint: Take a full-body photo in natural light for an honest scan.

errors.rate: Too many scans. Try again in a minute.
errors.blur: Analysis failed. Take a sharper photo.

scan.creditRequiredHint: You need at least 1 credit to scan your outfit.
scan.creditTopup: Top up your credits to continue.

missionStory.title: Story Mission
missionStory.subtitle: Share your outfit in a story (Instagram or TikTok) tagging @vibe. 5 validated stories = 1 free scan.
missionStory.scanGranted: +1 scan credited 🎉 Well done, 5 stories validated!
missionStory.errorHint: Try again with a real public story tagging @vibe.

errors.not_a_story: Not an active story. Send a screenshot of a published Instagram/TikTok story.
errors.no_outfit: No outfit detected in the story.
errors.missing_tag: @vibe tag not found. Add it to your story.
errors.duplicate: This story is too similar to a previous one.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests, try again in a minute.

profile.title: Profile
profile.rechargeHint: Buy scan packs from €2. No subscription, no expiry.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeHint: Pick the app's color accent. The base stays cream, white and black.
settings.creditsHint: No subscription: buy scans by the pack, they never expire.

home.closetEmpty: Your closet is empty. Add pieces for tailor-made suggestions.

dressing.title: Build your outfit
dressing.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in a minute.
dressing.paymentRequired: AI credits exhausted. Top up your credits.
dressing.closetUsed: {{count}} pieces from your Vibe Closet will be used.

paywall.title: Top up your credits
paywall.subtitle: 1 credit = 1 full AI scan (fit audit, colors, 2026 touch, shopping list).
paywall.paid: Payment confirmed! Your credits are being added.

onboarding.haveAccount: I already have an account → Sign in

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change it anytime from your settings.

name.title: Welcome. What's your name?
name.subtitle: Your first name helps me advise you like a stylist friend.

morpho.title: Your body shape?
morpho.subtitle: Your measurements help us better adjust cuts and volumes for a perfect fit.

location.title: Enable location
location.subtitle: VIBE checks your city's weather so your look is as practical as it is stylish.
location.later: You can enable it later from your profile

phone.title: Last step: your number
phone.subtitle: You'll get an SMS code to secure your account. No spam.
phone.legal: By continuing, you accept the Terms and Privacy Policy.
phone.invalidDesc: Check the country and the number entered.
phone.demoDesc: SMS not connected yet — you can continue.
phone.codeInvalidDesc: Check the code received by SMS.
